name: pradosoft/prado-websockets
description: WebSocket server and client for the PRADO PHP framework: RFC 6455 over HTTP/1.1, with HTTP/2 (RFC 8441) via nghttp2.

suggest.ext-openssl: TLS with ALPN for wss:// and HTTP/2 over TLS (h2).
suggest.ext-sockets: Faster socket primitives for the standalone server.
suggest.lib-nghttp2: The system libnghttp2 shared library, used by pradosoft/prado-http2 for HTTP/2.
suggest.ext-ffi: Required by pradosoft/prado-http2 to bind libnghttp2 for HTTP/2.
suggest.pradosoft/prado-http2: HTTP/2 (RFC 8441) WebSocket multiplexing; without it the server serves HTTP/1.1 only.
